recentArticles.title: Groww remains on top as Sahi enters top 20 stock brokers in June
recentArticles.summary: The active client base of India’s top stock brokers declined further in June, with the industry shedding around 1.37 lakh clients month-on-month. Total active clients fell to 4.54 crore from 4.55 crore in May. Groww continued to dominate the rankings, while Sahi, led by former Swiggy CTO  Dale Vaz, entered the top 20 brokers after recording the largest net client gain during the month.
